How Evvy Works

Step 1

Test Your Vaginal Microbiome

Evvy offers the most comprehensive vaginal microbiome test, using metagenomic sequencing to uncover 700+ bacteria and fungi — all with a simple, at-home swab.

Step 2

Get Advanced Results

Your results are reviewed by a licensed clinician and come with personalized insights into your vaginal health — including potential links to symptoms, fertility, and overall well-being.

Step 3

Get a Plan + Rx Treatment

Receive a customized plan — including targeted prescriptions from a clinician if eligible — all tailored to your unique microbiome.

Step 4

Track Progress

Track your progress by testing over time, and support your health with proactive products like our Women’s Complete Probiotic.

How can Evvy help you?

Take our quick 5-question quiz and we'll share personalized testing recommendations for how we can support your vaginal health — plus a personal discount!

FAQs / Help Center

The Evvy Vaginal Health Test is a CLIA, CAP, and CLEP certified test and is intended to screen for bacteria and fungi in the vaginal microbiome. Evvy does not test for STIs unless your test includes the Expanded PCR Panel. The results from the test are not designed to diagnose, treat, or cure any medical condition on its own. You always need to consult a provider to confirm a diagnosis, which is possible to do through the Evvy platform. Evvy is not intended to replace the advice of your doctor, your Pap smear, or regular OB-GYN visits.

*Statements about the Women’s Complete Probiotic have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
